test_case.input: "Air force confirms a precision strike on the depot at dawn; workers at the nearby plant evacuated."
"Nurses at St. Mary's walked off shift at 6am and are now picketing the main entrance over staffing ratios."
"Hearing there might be some kind of demonstration downtown later?? anyone know whats going on"
"Demonstrators clashed with riot police outside the parliament in Quito tonight after the subsidy cuts were announced; tear gas deployed, two streets closed."
